anti_centroid_locks: do not replace source specificity with generic motivational framing

primary_archetype.category_geometry: source-led short with hook, recognition, tension, landing
primary_archetype.local_function: move the viewer from observing a pattern to recognizing their own version
rejection_conditions: the source does not contain a complete recognition turn
primary_archetype.source_fit: approved Expression Moment contains the exact recognition turn

rejected_alternatives: achievement story lacks the active identity tension

role_tension_contract.participation_threshold: admit where the pattern appears once
role_tension_contract.recognition_path: the source names the exact moment the pattern appears

sequence_or_reading_logic: source statement → exact recognition → contrast → participation threshold
wrong_reading_locks: do not imply the person lacks capability
